_metadata.description: Registry of UQ teaching-period (semester) codes as used in course-profile URLs and the JacSON index, mapped to labels, types, and Jac (curriculum.uq.edu.au) year/period equivalents. Single source of truth for semester labelling — replaces hardcoded maps in app.js semesterLabel() and import scripts (wiring pending).
notes: Code spacing is NOT uniform — always look up, never compute.
The current course-profiles.uq.edu.au system serves S2 2024 (7460) onwards; earlier periods live on archive.course-profiles.uq.edu.au (legacy ECP, different URL scheme with opaque ids).
Jac fromYYYYSS = year*100 + period: period 1 = Semester 1, 2 = Semester 2; summer period id TBC (a draft instance showed 202604 — verify before relying on it).

MBA and other intensive/weekend deliveries do NOT use separate period codes — they appear as additional class instances inside standard semesters (e.g. MGTS7812's two classes in 7620). Match offerings by SI-NET class number, not by period.
7490/7590 are micro periods (medical school special-calendar courses with 'S'-suffix codes, e.g. IMED1242S). The scraper's course-code regex currently rejects the S suffix — known parked fix.
7450's label inferred from JacSON folder ordering; verify against harvest data (legacy era, no current-system URLs to confirm from).
